suite.name: Assignment1

test.name: Comprehensive Selenium Interaction Test

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Enabled
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: You logged into a secure area!
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Switch Window
kw.doc: Switches to browser window matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log Test completed successfully. Screenshot saved.
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Log Test completed successfully. Screenshot saved.' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Log Test completed successfully. Screenshot saved.' found.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Execution of common Selenium actions in a single flow.
test.status: No keyword with name 'Log Test completed successfully. Screenshot saved.' found.

suite.doc: A test suite covering essential SeleniumLibrary keywords.

test.name: Handle Dropdown Menu Options

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:dropdown' by index 1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: List Selection Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying list 'id:dropdown' has option [ Option 1 ] selected.
kw.doc: Verifies selection list ``locator`` has ``expected`` options selected.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:dropdown' by value 2.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: List Selection Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying list 'id:dropdown' has option [ Option 2 ] selected.
kw.doc: Verifies selection list ``locator`` has ``expected`` options selected.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:dropdown' by label Option 1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: List Selection Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying list 'id:dropdown' has option [ Option 1 ] selected.
kw.doc: Verifies selection list ``locator`` has ``expected`` options selected.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Test selecting dropdown options by Index, Value, and Label.

test.name: Execute Selenium Advanced Elements

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Value
kw.doc: Returns the value attribute of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Get Element Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the value of ``attribute`` from the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Testing Text, Values, Attributes, and JS Execution

test.name: Handle Dropdowns

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:dropdown' by index 1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:dropdown' by value 2.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:dropdown' by label Option 1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Testing Index, Value, and Label selections

test.name: Handle Frames and Windows

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select Frame
kw.doc: Sets frame identified by ``locator`` as the current frame.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Hello from inside the frame!' into text field 'id:tinymce'.

kw.doc: Sets the main frame as the current frame.

kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.doc: Switches to browser window matching ``locator``.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

Close Window
kw.doc: Closes currently opened and selected browser window/tab.

suite.name: Assignment4allkeywords

test.name: Master Selenium Keyword Demo

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Checkbox Should Be Selected
kw.doc: Verifies checkbox ``locator`` is selected/checked.

kw.name: Unselect Checkbox
kw.doc: Removes the selection of checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'tag:h2' contains exact text 'Login Page'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'This is where you can log into the secure area'.
kw.arg: This is where you can log into the secure area
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: You logged into a secure area!
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Mouse Over
kw.doc: Simulates hovering the mouse over the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Covers Navigation, Forms, Assertions, and Browser Control.

suite.doc: A master suite covering major SeleniumLibrary keyword categories.

test.name: File System and Selenium Operations

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Directory Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given path points to an existing directory.

kw.name: Create File
kw.arg: This is the content of the source file.
kw.doc: Creates a file with the given content and encoding.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Copy File
kw.doc: Copies the source file into the destination.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Remove Directory
kw.doc: Removes the directory pointed to by the given ``path``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Test case to create directories, write files, and copy them.
